content:
The Western Paradise (also known as the Western Pure Land, Sukhavati) is the Buddha-land of Amitabha (Infinite Life Buddha). Its core characteristic is the absence of all suffering and the experience of only joy, in stark contrast to our 'enduring' (Saha) world. Located in the west of our world, ten trillion Buddha-lands away (Amitabha Sutra).

Main Buddha: Amitabha Buddha (Infinite Light, Infinite Life), who constantly preaches the Dharma; flanked by Avalokiteshvara Bodhisattva and Mahasthamaprapta Bodhisattva, collectively known as the 'Three Sages of the West'.

Land Environment: Adorned with Seven Treasures, flawless.
Ground: Gold as the ground, flat, soft, bright, and clean, without mountains, rivers, ravines, thorns, or stones.
Seven Treasure Ponds and Eight Merit Waters: Seven treasure ponds everywhere (gold, silver, lapis lazuli, crystal, tridacna, red pearl, agate). The water possesses eight merits: sweet, cold, soft, light, clear, fragrant, thirst-quenching, and heart-nourishing. Golden sand at the bottom, seven-treasure pathways, and lotuses in the pond as large as wheels, emitting blue, yellow, red, and white light.
Architecture: Seven-treasure pavilions, palaces, and lecture halls, floating in the air, changing size at will, transparent and bright, countless times better than the heavenly realms.
Precious Trees and Heavenly Music: Seven rows of trees, seven rows of railings, seven rows of nets, all made of four treasures. The wind blows through the trees and nets, producing subtle Dharma sounds like hundreds of thousands of instruments playing together, naturally leading listeners to mindfulness of Buddha, Dharma, and Sangha.
Climate and Heavenly Rain: No heat or cold, no wind or rain, always mild and comfortable; Mandarava flowers rain down from the sky six times a day and night, fragrant and colorful.
Marvelous Birds: White cranes, peacocks, parrots, Kalavinkas, etc., all manifested by the Buddha to produce harmonious sounds proclaiming the Dharma.

Sentient Beings: No suffering, only joy, infinite lifespan.
Rebirth: Beings are born from lotus flowers in the seven treasure ponds, not from parents, free from the suffering of birth, aging, sickness, and death.
Appearance: Purple-gold bodies, majestic and solemn, similar to Amitabha Buddha; possessing five supernatural powers: heavenly eye, heavenly ear, telepathy, past-life recall, and spiritual travel, free and unobstructed.
Lifespan: Immeasurable kalpas, nearly eternal, without early death or aging.
Nature: All are superior good people, free from greed, anger, ignorance, jealousy, or conflict; compassionate, equal, wise, and pure, constantly hearing the Dharma.
Life: Clothing and food manifest naturally without labor; in the morning, one can visit ten trillion Buddha-lands to offer to Buddhas and return by mealtime.

Time and Space: Infinite and Eternal.
Time: No day or night, no months or years, eternal happiness; the world does not undergo the changes of formation, existence, decay, and void.
Space: Vast and boundless, never crowded even with beings from all ten directions; a single grain of dust can contain three thousand great worlds.
title: Ethereal Buddhist Pure Land scene
description: A highly detailed prompt describing the Western Pure Land (Sukhavati) with golden ground, lotus ponds, and divine architecture.

content: A cinematic historical war scene from Romance of the Three Kingdoms depicting the straw boat borrowing arrows on a wide gray river during a violent rainstorm, viewed from a slightly elevated front angle. In the foreground, a convoy of 6 narrow wooden boats is lashed together in a line, each boat wrapped thickly with dense bundles of straw along the sides and bow, creating rough protective walls. Hundreds of black-feathered arrows are embedded all over the straw armor, sticking out in every direction, with more arrows flying diagonally through the air in heavy wind and rain. The lead boat dominates the frame; its cabin is covered with dark blue fabric curtains and blue roof panels. Standing calmly inside the front cabin are 2 robed ancient Chinese strategists, one in a pale white robe holding a feather fan and one darker-robed companion beside him, both composed and unhurried amid the chaos. Along the left side of the boats are clustered oarsmen and soldiers in dark period clothing, with several large war drums visible on the decks. In the background across the river, a massive enemy river fleet fills the misty distance: dozens of tall wooden warships, watchtowers, and platforms crowded with troops and archers. Multiple military banners bearing the single large Chinese character "曹" rise above the fleet, indicating Cao Cao's forces. The atmosphere is cold, desaturated, and epic, with fog, smoke, rain streaks, rough water, low contrast blue-gray lighting, and highly detailed realistic textures in wet wood, straw, fabric, and river spray. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic ancient Chinese battlefield tableau, dramatic scale, moody historical realism, vertical composition.

content: A traditional Chinese ink calligraphy artwork on aged beige xuan paper, presented as a clean flat scan or photograph of a single hanging scroll page with no frame. The composition is entirely vertical Chinese cursive script, bold expressive grass-script brushwork in deep black ink with dynamic stroke variation, flying-white texture, dry-brush breaks, and elegant rhythm. Write the full poem {argument name="poem text" default="怒发冲冠，凭栏处、潇潇雨歇。抬望眼，仰天长啸，壮怀激烈。三十功名尘与土，八千里路云和月。莫等闲，白了少年头，空悲切。\n靖康耻，犹未雪；臣子恨，何时灭！驾长车，踏破贺兰山缺。壮志饥餐胡虏肉，笑谈渴饮匈奴血。待从头，收拾旧山河，朝天阙。"} in large vertical columns arranged right to left, about 8 main poem columns across the page, each column flowing freely with slight variations in spacing and tilt. Leave a wide left margin containing a smaller vertical inscription with 3 narrow columns: the title and attribution reading {argument name="inscription text" default="岳飞 满江红 甲辰書月 某元"}, written in a more restrained but still cursive hand. Add exactly 3 small red seal stamps: 2 stacked square seals in the lower-left margin beneath the inscription, and 1 small oval seal near the upper-right edge beside the first main column. The paper should have subtle warm tan mottling, soft fibers, faint age marks, and natural uneven tone. Overall mood is heroic, scholarly, and museum-quality, with authentic Song-inspired Chinese calligraphy aesthetics, minimal background, high detail, and faithful brush texture.

content:
# Art that reveals a character's face from a chaotic collection of notes and symbols

---

## Style
- Mass of handwritten notes, formulas, symbols, and random lines in black ink on white paper.
- Scribbled chaos scattered across the paper.
- Sporadic emphasis using {argument name="accent color" default="red ink"} (lines, fills, marker-like blobs).
- Texture of analog notebook doodles.

---

## Composition
- Random notes and symbols cover the entire area.
- The density of black ink lines and characters concentrates on the position of the "character's face."
- As a result, the silhouette and expression of the given character's face faintly emerge from the chaos.
- The face is not realistic but formed by a collection of chaotic fragments.

---

## Color Palette
- Mainly monochrome (black and white).
- {argument name="accent color" default="red ink"} placed sporadically as an accent.
- Low saturation, emphasizing the feel of analog paper and ink.

---

## Expressive Elements
- Mixed strings of semi-readable Japanese, English, and numbers.
- Mathematical symbols, arrows, dots, slashes, crosses, and ink drips.
- The outlines of the face, eyes, and hair emerge from the "negative space" and "shading" of the symbol placement.

---

## Prohibitions
- Direct, realistic portraits.
- Digitally processed, orderly geometric patterns.
- Colorful or oversaturated expressions.
- Logos, watermarks, or artificial CG aesthetics.

---

## Definition of Done (DoD)
- The whole piece works as a "chaotic collection of notes and symbols."
- The provided character's face naturally emerges from the density and arrangement of chaos.
- Colors are monochrome + {argument name="accent color" default="red accent"} only.
- Maintains the hand-drawn texture of paper and ink.
title: Abstract Chaos Character Art
description: A highly detailed structured prompt that transforms a character image into abstract art composed of notes and symbols.

content: A highly detailed, cinematic, surreal illustration of an astronaut in a white spacesuit kneeling to carefully prune a {argument name="plant type" default="bonsai tree"}. The astronaut is situated on a floating fragment of a {argument name="architecture style" default="ruined classical marble temple"} overgrown with ivy and moss, featuring ornate gold trim, classical columns, and a stone statue of a woman. The platform is suspended in zero gravity in outer space. Floating debris, including rocks, chunks of marble, and loose leaves, drift weightlessly around the scene. In the background, a {argument name="background planet" default="large reddish-orange planet"} dominates the starry cosmos. The lighting is dramatic and realistic, highlighting the contrast between the ancient ruins, delicate nature, and the futuristic astronaut.
title: Astronaut Tending Bonsai in Space Ruins
description: Generates a surreal sci-fi scene of an astronaut interacting with nature on a floating architectural ruin in space.

Above the horizon is a {argument name="sky condition" default="clear, pale blue sky with a few faint, wispy clouds"}. The composition emphasizes the vast emptiness and scale of the landscape compared to the small animals.
title: Aerial View of Vast Grassy Plain with Two Sheep
description: Generates an aerial landscape photograph of a vast, flat grassy field with two small animals, emphasizing scale and minimalism.

content: A {argument name="art style" default="traditional Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print"} landscape featuring an {argument name="main character" default="anthropomorphic glass of beer with a frothy head, a happy smiling face, stick-like yellow arms and legs, and traditional sandals"} walking on a dirt path. The character holds a blue round fan displaying the kanji "{argument name="fan text" default="涼"}". The background includes a large pine tree and a wooden bridge on the right with 3 small figures crossing, plus 3 more figures walking on the path. To the left, tall reeds border a river leading to a distant {argument name="background mountain" default="snow-capped Mount Fuji"} under a gradient sky. A traditional text cartouche in the top left reads "{argument name="top left text" default="東海道 五十三次之内 由井"}" next to red artist seals, with a matching cartouche in the bottom left. The image has vintage, muted colors and authentic woodblock paper textures.
title: Ukiyo-e Mascot Landscape
description: Generates a traditional Japanese woodblock print featuring a customizable mascot character in a classic Mount Fuji landscape.

content: A cinematic, photorealistic wide-angle shot from inside a spacecraft looking out a circular window into the deep blackness of space. On the left side of the frame, a {argument name="celestial body left" default="massive, highly detailed crescent Moon"} dominates the view, showcasing intricate craters and rugged terrain illuminated by harsh sunlight. On the right side, a smaller {argument name="celestial body right" default="crescent Earth"} glows with blue oceans and white atmospheric clouds. In the immediate foreground on the far left, an {argument name="foreground element" default="astronaut's arm wearing a dark blue spacesuit"} is visible, featuring a prominent {argument name="patch logo" default="NASA"} patch on the shoulder. The astronaut is holding a digital tablet with a glowing blue, complex user interface. The edge of the spacecraft window frames the scene, with subtle lens flares and reflections on the glass adding to the immersive, sci-fi documentary aesthetic. High contrast, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution.
title: Cinematic Spacecraft View of Moon and Earth
description: Generates a photorealistic, cinematic view from inside a spacecraft window looking at celestial bodies, with an astronaut in the foreground.

content: An overhead anime illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Anna Yanami"} lying on her back on a {argument name="setting" default="classroom desk"}. She has messy {argument name="hair color" default="blue"} hair with an ahoge, and bright blue eyes. She is {argument name="expression" default="smiling happily with a slight blush"} and {argument name="pose" default="holding up both hands in peace signs"}. She wears a white short-sleeved school shirt decorated with four bows down the front in alternating colors of dark blue, light blue, and yellow, paired with a light blue pleated skirt featuring a white stripe near the hem. The scene is lit by warm afternoon sunlight casting distinct shadows across the desk and her body, with a wooden floor visible in the background.
title: Overhead Anime Girl Peace Sign Portrait
description: Generates a top-down anime illustration of a girl lying on a desk making peace signs, ideal for character fanart.

content: A dark fantasy anime illustration of a lone swordsman on a desolate battlefield under a giant {argument name="moon color" default="blood-red"} moon. The character has {argument name="character hair" default="long dark hair in a messy high ponytail"}, glowing red eyes, and wears tattered black traditional clothing while holding a {argument name="weapon" default="katana"} angled downwards. In the background, a {argument name="background structure" default="ruined Japanese castle"} looms amidst dark, swirling clouds. The scene includes 3 prominent tattered banners with Japanese kanji planted among shadowy debris. The lighting is cinematic and ominous, utilizing a color palette of {argument name="color palette" default="deep blacks and intense crimson reds"}.
title: Dark Fantasy Samurai Battlefield
description: Generates a cinematic anime illustration of a lone warrior on a battlefield under a giant moon, perfect for dark fantasy concept art.

content: A highly detailed, intricate {argument name="art style" default="black and white line art illustration"} of an {argument name="subject" default="anime-style angel"}. She has long, flowing wavy hair adorned with a {argument name="headpiece" default="floral crown of roses and lilies"} and is looking directly at the viewer with large, expressive eyes. Her {argument name="pose" default="hands are clasped together in prayer"}. She has large, feathered angel wings extending from her back and wears an incredibly ornate dress completely covered in dense floral patterns, lace, and filigree, along with a detailed jeweled choker and dangling earrings. Behind her head is a radiant, glowing halo with straight, sunburst-like lines. The entire background is filled with symmetrical, baroque-style floral and vine filigree, creating a dense, tapestry-like frame. The style is strictly monochrome, resembling a highly complex ink drawing, engraving, or an intricate adult coloring book page, with meticulous linework.
title: Intricate Monochrome Angel Line Art
description: Generates a highly detailed, black-and-white line art illustration of an angel with ornate floral and filigree patterns, perfect for coloring book pages or engraving-style art.

content: A close-up portrait of an {argument name="character description" default="anime girl with shoulder-length wavy hair and a gentle smile"}, wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="school uniform with a bow tie"}. The image is a hand-drawn sketch on a glossy white whiteboard, created entirely with a {argument name="marker color" default="blue"} dry-erase marker. The art style features sketchy, varying line weights and rough marker shading, capturing a casual yet highly skilled anime illustration. Subtle light reflections on the top right of the whiteboard surface enhance the realistic photograph-of-a-drawing aesthetic.
title: Whiteboard Marker Anime Sketch
description: Generates a realistic photograph of an anime character sketched on a whiteboard using a colored dry-erase marker.

content: A photorealistic portrait of a young Asian woman with a {argument name="hair style and color" default="short black bob haircut and bangs"}, seen in profile. She is {argument name="action" default="smoking a cigarette"}, holding it to her lips with her right hand, with a thin trail of blue smoke rising. She is {argument name="setting" default="leaning against a metal balcony railing at night"}. She wears a {argument name="clothing" default="white camisole and a light grey oversized cardigan that has slipped off her shoulder"}, exposing her bare shoulder and back. She has a small pearl earring. The background is dark with blurred, out-of-focus warm city lights. The image features a {argument name="aesthetic" default="cinematic, moody atmosphere with noticeable film grain and a direct flash photography aesthetic"}.
title: Cinematic Night Portrait of a Woman Smoking
description: Generates a photorealistic, moody nighttime portrait of a woman leaning on a balcony, ideal for cinematic character concepts.

content: An anime illustration of a confident female wrestler standing in a ring. She has {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair in a high ponytail with a pink bow. She wears a {argument name="outfit color" default="pink"} one-piece leotard with white and gold accents, matching fingerless gloves, and knee-high lace-up boots. She poses with one hand on her hip under bright stadium spotlights, with a blurred audience in the background. A stylized logo in the bottom left reads "{argument name="logo text" default="Sunset Emilia"}". The style features detailed shading and glossy skin highlights.
title: Anime Female Wrestler in Arena
description: Generates an anime-style illustration of a female wrestler posing in a ring with a custom text logo.

content: A high-angle, anime-style illustration of a girl with {argument name="hair color" default="long dark hair with purple tips"} standing inside a futuristic glass elevator, looking up at a massive space elevator structure. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="sailor uniform with a pleated skirt and thigh-high socks"}. The elevator cab has metallic railings, glowing cyan accents, and a digital display showing an upward arrow and the text "{argument name="altitude text" default="005829 km"}". Through the large glass ceiling and windows, a colossal, intricately detailed space station with a central pillar and a large ring structure is visible against a backdrop of a starry sky and the curvature of {argument name="planet" default="Earth"} with clouds below. The lighting is dramatic, emphasizing the vast scale of the space structure and the atmospheric perspective.
title: Anime Girl in Space Elevator
description: Generates an anime-style illustration of a character looking up at a massive space structure from inside a glass elevator.

content: A photorealistic, cinematic shot set in the {argument name="location" default="White House press briefing room"}. At the podium sits {argument name="seated character" default="Sam Altman"}, wearing a dark suit and blue tie, looking visibly uncomfortable and nervous, staring blankly ahead. Standing directly behind him is {argument name="standing character" default="Homelander from The Boys"}, wearing his signature blue superhero suit with red gloves and gold eagle shoulder pads. The standing character has one red-gloved hand resting heavily and intimidatingly on the seated character's shoulder, while using his other hand to drink from a {argument name="beverage" default="glass bottle of milk"} with a confident, slightly unhinged smirk. In the background, there is a US flag on the left and a blue oval White House seal on the wall behind them. The podium has a sign reading "THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON".
title: Intimidating Press Conference Meme
description: A photorealistic satirical image of a superhero intimidating a tech CEO at a White House press briefing.

content: Create an image consisting of {argument name="panel count" default="five"} sub-images, each with a different style: 1) An analogue clock showing {argument name="time" default="7:42"}. 2) A woman holding cards in her hands. 3) A glass of wine filled to the brim. 4) Real photography of a physical chessboard, fully visible, with all the pieces in their standard starting positions. 5) Two dice, with the numbers clearly visible.
title: Five-Panel Benchmarking Challenge
description: A complex multi-part prompt used to benchmark AI performance across five different styles and subjects, including clocks, humans, liquids, and games.
